checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds specbridge-standard-readiness, a standard readiness artifact, artifact inventory family coverage, documentation, dashboards, final report, audit packet, audit evidence, and post-merge closure evidence under issue-228 scope.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: CLI coverage validates command shape, stable read-only output, required fields, readiness enum, recommended action enum, cleanup/enforcement posture, no-runtime/no-secret boundaries, MCP read-only posture, output path behavior, force behavior, bad path behavior, and standard_readiness artifact family coverage.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command does not call the network, mutate GitHub, launch Claude Code, launch Codex, read secrets, change billing, change CI/CD security, enforce cleanup, enforce retention, or deploy. Work stayed inside the issue-228 allowed scope; post-merge closure changed only memory and evidence files.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The readiness output records explicit false boundary flags for runtime launches, network, GitHub mutation, secret access, billing, CI/CD security changes, and deployment, with cleanup_permission and retention_enforcement both none.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are declared in the issue-228 contract and scope manifest, including CLI, tests, docs, dashboards, artifacts, and evidence files.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: validate-contracts, validate-contract-scopes, test-specbridge-cli, validate-final-reports, validate-audit-packets, validate-chatgpt-audits, specbridge-smoke, and git diff --check passed locally.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub Actions passed on PR #229: Foundation Validation, SpecBridge Review Gate, SpecBridge PR Review Report, and Claude Review Non Blocking. The deterministic PR review report passed with zero blocking findings.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records local validation status, GitHub CI status, PR #229 merge status, deployment not applicable, issue closure, post-merge closure evidence, and unresolved risks about cleanup/retention remaining blocked and future task selection requiring doctor plus next-task evidence.

findings.evidence: The readiness status reports repository branch and artifact debt while retaining cleanup_permission=none and retention_enforcement=none.
findings.recommendation: Keep cleanup and retention enforcement blocked unless a future dedicated policy and execution contract explicitly authorize them.

unresolved_risks: Branch cleanup and artifact retention remain blocked even when the readiness output reports visible debt.
Future governed tasks must keep using doctor and next-task evidence before selecting runtime-expansion work.
